text: As I move from the quiet, sterile corridor outside a glass-walled meeting room toward this vibrant, colorful display space, I feel a gentle shift in energy. The meeting room feels clinical and expectant, as though waiting for ideas yet to be spoken. In contrast, the R+D wall pulses with creativity and bold intent, words leaping out—reminding me that even in structured spaces, innovation tries to break through, begging for a place to connect, evolve, and transform. I feel a hopeful anticipation, inspired by the promise of human ingenuity on display.
